title: Amazon Reviews Scraper
description: Reliably extract product reviews from Amazon. Handles blocked requests and returns structured data.

url.title: Product Reviews URL
url.description: Full URL to Amazon product reviews page, e.g., https://www.amazon.com/product-reviews/B08N5WRWNW

asin.title: Product ASIN
asin.description: Amazon Product ID (10 characters), e.g., B08N5WRWNW

max_reviews.title: Maximum Reviews
max_reviews.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape

page.title: Page Number
page.description: Reviews page number to start from

use_apify_proxy.description: Route through Apify proxy for reliability
